title: angelica likiangensis
intro: Angelica likiangensis, also known as Angelica likiangensis Franch., is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the Sichuan and Yunnan provinces in China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and supporting the digestive system. Angelica likiangensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
